# Compare the Cool / Compare the Heat

> Independent product reviews and Amazon/eBay price comparison for cooling, heating, and air-quality appliances across UK, EU, US, and Australia.

## Sites
- https://comparethecool.com (cooling-season default branding)
- https://comparetheheat.com (heating-season branding; same catalog)

## Key pages
- /{country}/best/{category} — best-of comparison with Top 3 + price table
- /{country}/p/{slug} — product detail
- /{country}/tools/btu-calculator — BTU sizing
- /{country}/tools/running-cost — electricity cost estimator
- /{country}/blog — long-tail guides

## Countries
uk, de, fr, it, es, nl, us, au, eu

## Data
Product catalog is stored in Supabase (`ctc_products`) and baked into static pages at build/ISR. Prices are not regenerated by AI on each request.

## Disclosure
Amazon Associates and eBay Partner Network affiliate links. We earn from qualifying purchases.
